lore.english:
Taimanin, a Gosha Academy student. She pretends to look and speak like a so-called 'mademoiselle'. Since she is not good at having conversations with others, she gets nervous that she unintentionally looks down on others. When this happens she always whines about her problems to a doll she secretly carries all the time. When she's on a mission, she tends to stay silent not to mess up the team spirit.

A Puppet Art ninja. Her ninja art 'Puppet Doll' forces certain actions on others with the use of the doll. It has a limited range, so it can be avoided by being out of the attack radius.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ATK] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ATK of All allies by 20% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase ATK of All allies by 20% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wire Dance[-]
skills.description: Using a wire, attacks the enemy 4 times while moving like a dancer.
skills.description_readable: Using a wire, attacks the enemy 4 times while moving like a dancer.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Invisible Silk[-]
skills.description: When hit, increases the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of all the attacker's skills by 1 turn.
skills.description_readable: When hit, increases the Cooldown of all the attacker's skills by 1 turn.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Silk Barrier[-]
skills.description:
Deploys wires to suspend [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] in midair, then instantly slices and attacks them.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:170303]%)[-] [&SpdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:170303]%[-] chance on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:170303] turn(s)
If the target already has [&SpdDown], additionally inflicts [&Restraint].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:170302] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Deploys wires to suspend ALL enemies in midair, then instantly slices and attacks them.
Target hit is inflicted with (-19.5%) SPD DOWN at a 90% chance on the Last Attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target already has SPD DOWN, additionally inflicts Immobilize.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_1701]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_1703]
skill_data.description:
Deploys wires to suspend [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] in midair, then instantly slices and attacks them.
Inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:171303]%)[-] [&EvdDown] to the target hit at a [&Color_Cyan][R:171303]%[-] chance on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:171303] turn(s)
If the target already has [&EvdDown], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:171302]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:171302]%[-] chance.
skill_data.description_readable:
Deploys wires to suspend ALL enemies in midair, then instantly slices and attacks them.
Inflicts (-19.5%) EVD DOWN to the target hit at a 90% chance on the Last Attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target already has EVD DOWN, reduces the Turn Gauge by (15%) at a 70% chance.
